title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: Flash is a decorator-based framework that enables single-command GPU cloud deployment from an IDE with hot reload capabilities. It replaces multi-step Docker and registry workflows with @flash.endpoint annotation on async Python functions, supporting model chaining and serverless autoscaling on RunPod infrastructure.
writeup: This talk introduces Flash, a decorator-based framework from RunPod for deploying GPU workloads to the cloud with a single command directly from an IDE. It replaces multi-step Docker build and registry push workflows with an @flash.endpoint annotation applied to async Python functions, and it supports hot reload during development. Key capabilities include model chaining and serverless autoscaling on RunPod infrastructure.
